strengths: Successfully introduced the loop through the trainer opening
Demonstrated proper loop positioning technique around the target appendage
Maintained steady camera view throughout most of the procedure
weaknesses: Failed to complete the tail cut within the time limit
Spent excessive time on pusher advancement without completing the final phase
Did not achieve the required task completion despite proper initial setup

drills.name: Loop-to-cut sequence drill
drills.description: Practice the complete sequence from loop placement to tail cutting in 10 repetitions, focusing on smooth transitions between phases without time pressure.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the tail cut within the time limit

drills.name: Pusher efficiency practice
drills.description: Rehearse pusher advancement with deliberate, controlled movements to minimize adjustment time and achieve faster loop tightening.
drills.targets_weakness: Spent excessive time on pusher advancement

drills.name: Timed completion runs
drills.description: Perform complete task attempts with a 120-second target to build speed while maintaining accuracy.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not achieve the required task completion

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid positioning skills into faster, more decisive completion sequences. Your setup technique is sound but needs to be paired with efficient finishing.
